## Source Idea

Link to the relevant entry in `docs/content/ideas-backlog.md`, or explain why
this should skip the backlog.

## Goal

What should change on the website?

## Audience

Who should get value from it?

## Source Material

Link notes, articles, books, talks, or existing site pages.

## Done When

- [ ] Draft content exists in the appropriate collection.
- [ ] Tags and dates are set.
- [ ] Links and citations are checked.
- [ ] The source idea is updated or removed from the backlog if needed.
